meaning: n.背脊,山脊,屋脊,山脉,犁垄v.起皱,成脊状延伸,翻土作垄
examples: The fawn ran to the top of the ridge.
He slowed the pace as they crested the ridge.
Rammick lives high on a ridge in a 400-home subdivision.
On a ridge a few miles away, we spot a herd of 40 grazing elk.
We take off in pursuit, doing a fast hike straight up the steep ridge.
